generalization_gap.note: Raw AUPRC gap is confounded by base-rate differences (TraitGym base rate ~10%, ClinVar subsample ~50%). Compare each partition's AUPRC to its own base rate for a fair transfer read.

clinvar.note: Reference AUPRCs on this exact ClinVar subsample are computed at build time and would live in hidden/build_stats.json. Field-standard predictors (AlphaMissense, REVEL, ClinPred) score >0.9 on ClinVar P/LP vs B/LB but are trained on ClinVar and are near-circular — treat them as an upper bound, not a bar.
